//fabrik:jobs:worker marks that this binary hosts the jobs worker. The
generator wraps run() in a signal-driven graceful-shutdown envelope,
calls jobs.Run with the config the worker function returns, and appends
its drain to shutdownWaits. With no server, run() blocks on the root
context until a signal, then the deferred drain stops the worker.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs => JOBSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"
)

//fabrik:provider
func NewJobStore() (jobs.Store, error) { return jobs.NewMemoryStore(), nil }

type Welcome struct{ UserID int64 }

//fabrik:job
func SendWelcome(ctx context.Context, m Welcome) error { return nil }

//fabrik:jobs:worker
func Worker() (jobs.RuntimeConfig, error) {
	return jobs.RuntimeConfig{Worker: jobs.WorkerConfig{Concurrency: 4}, RunScheduler: true}, nil
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"sync/atomic"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()

	var signaled atomic.Bool
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		signaled.Store(true)
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	var shutdownWaits []func(context.Context) error
	defer func() {
		cancel()
		drainCtx, drainCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
		defer drainCancel()
		var drainErr error
		for _, wait := range shutdownWaits {
			if e := wait(drainCtx); e != nil && drainErr == nil {
				drainErr = e
			}
		}
		if signaled.Load() && errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) {
			err = nil
		}
		if err == nil {
			err = drainErr
		}
	}()

	// Providers
	sharedJobsStore, err := shared.NewJobStore()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	jobsManager, err := jobs.New(sharedJobsStore, jobs.Config{})
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Register
	// Jobs
	if err := jobs.Register[shared.Welcome](jobsManager, "shared.Welcome"); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if err := jobs.On[shared.Welcome](jobsManager, "SendWelcome", func(c jobs.Context, m shared.Welcome) error {
		return shared.SendWelcome(c, m)
	}); err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Start: after prepare, before serving
	jobsRuntime, err := shared.Worker()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	jobsDrain, err := jobs.Run(ctx, jobsManager, jobsRuntime)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	shutdownWaits = append(shutdownWaits, jobsDrain)

	<-ctx.Done()
	return nil
}
